'''竏嗄-ch-k-v''' ('''kamachkevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruin|ruin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-k-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruin|ruin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗄-ch-k-v
|-
! Lemma
| kamachkevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimachkevoko|thimachkevoko]] || [[word:jimachkevoko|jimachkevoko]] || [[word:shimachkevoko|shimachkevoko]] || [[word:kimachkevoko|kimachkevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumachkevoko|thuthumachkevoko]] || [[word:jujumachkevoko|jujumachkevoko]] || [[word:shushumachkevoko|shushumachkevoko]] || [[word:kukumachkevoko|kukumachkevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumachkevoko|thumachkevoko]] || [[word:jumachkevoko|jumachkevoko]] || [[word:shumachkevoko|shumachkevoko]] || [[word:kumachkevoko|kumachkevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumachkevoko|thumachkevoko]] || [[word:jumachkevoko|jumachkevoko]] || [[word:shumachkevoko|shumachkevoko]] || [[word:kumachkevoko|kumachkevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themachkevoko|themachkevoko]] || [[word:jemachkevoko|jemachkevoko]] || [[word:shemachkevoko|shemachkevoko]] || [[word:kemachkevoko|kemachkevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomachkevoko|thothomachkevoko]] || [[word:jojomachkevoko|jojomachkevoko]] || [[word:shoshomachkevoko|shoshomachkevoko]] || [[word:kokomachkevoko|kokomachkevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomachkevoko|thomachkevoko]] || [[word:jomachkevoko|jomachkevoko]] || [[word:shomachkevoko|shomachkevoko]] || [[word:komachkevoko|komachkevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomachkevoko|thomachkevoko]] || [[word:jomachkevoko|jomachkevoko]] || [[word:shomachkevoko|shomachkevoko]] || [[word:komachkevoko|komachkevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦmachkevoko|thﾃｦmachkevoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦmachkevoko|jﾃｦmachkevoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦmachkevoko|shﾃｦmachkevoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦmachkevoko|kﾃｦmachkevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamachkevoko|thathamachkevoko]] || [[word:jajamachkevoko|jajamachkevoko]] || [[word:shashamachkevoko|shashamachkevoko]] || [[word:kakamachkevoko|kakamachkevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamachkevoko|thamachkevoko]] || [[word:jamachkevoko|jamachkevoko]] || [[word:shamachkevoko|shamachkevoko]] || [[word:kamachkevoko|kamachkevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamachkevoko|thamachkevoko]] || [[word:jamachkevoko|jamachkevoko]] || [[word:shamachkevoko|shamachkevoko]] || [[word:kamachkevoko|kamachkevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamachkevithi|shamachkevithi]] || [[word:shamachkeviji|shamachkeviji]] || [[word:shamachkevishi|shamachkevishi]] || [[word:shamachkeviki|shamachkeviki]]

|-

|}
